parameters.query:
=SELECT
  j.airtable_id, j.prenom, j.nom, j.telephone, j.email, j.ville,
  j.departement, j.classe, j.secteur_vise, j.niveau_francais_declare,
  j.mna, j.disponibilite, j.besoins, j.attentes_mentor, j.genre,
  j.resume_suivi, j.structure, j.age_inscription,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT sk.skill_name, ', ')
     FROM koda_inference_skills sk
     WHERE (sk.source_type = 'classe' AND sk.source_value = j.classe)
        OR (sk.source_type = 'secteur' AND sk.source_value = j.secteur_vise)
        OR (sk.source_type = 'situation' AND sk.source_value = 'MNA' AND j.mna = true)
    ), ''
  ) AS skills_inferees,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT STRING_AGG(kc.message_text, ' | ' ORDER BY kc.sent_at DESC)
     FROM koda_conversations kc
     WHERE kc.jeune_id = j.airtable_id AND kc.direction = 'in'
     LIMIT 20
    ), ''
  ) AS conversations_recentes
FROM jeunes j
WHERE j.airtable_id = '{{ $('🔧 Parser input').first().json.airtable_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}
